content.full_text:
November 25, 2002

Carol Spirkoff Prime  
31687 Ricks Ranch Court  
Valley Center, CA 92082

Re: Our File No. W-02-286

Dear Ms. Spirkoff Prime:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your October 21, 2002 request for written advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act. As your question now relates to past conduct, we are unable to provide you with a written response. (See § 83114; subd. (b); regulation 18329, subd. (b)(8)(A), copy enclosed.)

I apologize for our inability to generate a response prior to your November 18, 2002 vote as a member of the Valley Center Community Planning Group.

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca  
General Counsel

Adrianne Korchmaros  
Political Reform Consultant
